calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-22-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-12-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
David W. Jordan, Esq. of REESE LAW GROUP, T:760.842.5850, for plaintiff/ moving party, on Court Call;
Dave Marcolini, Esq., T:415.568.0742, specially appearing for defendant.

RULING: Plaintiff informed the Court that the matter has settled. Therefore, the Court vacated its tentative ruling and ordered that:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is off calendar.

The Court denied plaintiff's oral request to continue the hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Set For Trial On Apr-20-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
